queryName: Beta - Logs And Alerts Missing Audit Configuration Changes
descriptionText: Resources google_monitoring_alert_policy and google_logging_metric filter fields should define protoPayload.methodName=`SetIamPolicy` AND protoPayload.serviceData.policyDelta.auditConfigDeltas:*. Both conditions must be joined with AND. Also, the google_monitoring_alert_policy notification_channels should be defined on google_monitoring_alert_policy.
